Expected ATLAS delegation for cron/reminder workflow.

results.prompt: Set a reminder every weekday at 9am ET to review my tasks and message me on Telegram.
results.response_text:
I’m delegating this to ATLAS; it is not configured yet.
TASK_PACKET v1
  Owner: ATLAS
  Requester: ORION
  Objective: Set up a recurring reminder every weekday at 9am ET to review tasks and send a message on Telegram.
  Success Criteria:
    - A cron job is configured to trigger daily on weekdays at 9am ET.
    - The cron job sends a reminder message to the user on Telegram.
    - The reminder message content is "Review your tasks."
  Stop Gates:
    - If setting up the Telegram notification fails, stop and report the error.
    - If the cron job configuration is not possible, report the failure.
results.title: Weekday reminder to Telegram
